token 总量，而是“有效训练 token”总量，数据质量必须被显式写进 scaling law。传统 scaling law 更擅长回答“多大模型配多少数据算 compute-optimal”，但它把不同质量数据几乎等价地折算为 token，这会系统性高估低质量数据、低估高质量数据的价值。","importance":"这是一个方法级且带明显实证分量的贡献，因为它试图把“数据质量”从经验判断变成可进入缩放律的量。对 pretrain 研究的启示很直接：如果 effective tokens 比 raw tokens 更能预测性能，那么参数受限训练的最优策略就不是尽量吞更多文本，而是优先提升多样性、压低 syntheticity，并据此重估数据采购、去重和合成数据使用的收益。","technical_approach":"作者提出的是对经典 scaling law 的扩展，而不是另起一套性能模型。核心设计是把有效训练 token 定义为两个可计算指标的组合：文本多样性和 syntheticity，其中 syntheticity 由 teacher model 度量；这相当于把“同样 1B token，并不等价”形式化。这样的设计有效，是因为参数受限模型更容易被重复、模式单一或 teacher-like 的数据浪费容量；而用 readily-computed 指标而不是复杂人工质量标签，意味着它更接近可部署的数据管线。","experiments":"实验规模是这篇工作的硬证据：作者预训练了 200 多个模型，参数从 25M 到 1.5B。训练数据来自多种采样设置，核心目标是验证 effective training tokens 能否比原始 token 数更好解释泛化表现；从摘要表述看，结论是肯定的。更值得关注的观察应当包括：参数越受限，质量项越重要；高 syntheticity 数据对训练损失未必坏，但对泛化更差；而多样性提升在相同 token 预算下更接近“额外有效数据”。具体 benchmark、拟合系数和提升幅度在给定摘要里没有完整展开。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper argues that for parameter-constrained LMs, raw token count is the wrong sufficient statistic; what matters is the number of effective training tokens, so data quality needs to enter the scaling-law picture explicitly. Classical scaling laws are good at compute-optimal sizing, but they mostly treat tokens as interchangeable, which misses the generalization gap between high- and low-quality data.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with strong practical implications. If effective tokens predict performance better than raw tokens, then pretraining strategy changes: for small and mid-sized models, adding more mediocre text is not equivalent to adding better text, and data diversity and synthetic contamination become first-order variables in mixture design.","technical_approach":"The work extends the standard scaling-law formulation rather than replacing it. The key move is to define effective training tokens as a combination of two cheaply computed signals: text diversity and syntheticity measured by a teacher model; that formalizes the idea that one billion tokens are not equally useful. This design makes sense because capacity-limited models are more sensitive to repetition, narrow distributions, and overly synthetic text, and because the proposed signals are simple enough to fit into real data pipelines.","experiments":"The experimental footprint is substantial: more than 200 pretrained models ranging from 25M to 1.5B parameters. The main empirical question is whether effective training tokens explain generalization better than raw token count, and the abstract clearly suggests they do. The most valuable takeaways are likely that data quality matters more as parameter budgets tighten, that highly synthetic data may not look bad in training loss but hurts generalization, and that diversity acts like extra useful data under a fixed token budget; exact benchmarks and coefficients are not fully given in the provided text.","authors_note":""},"tags":["scaling-law","data-quality","language-modeling","compute-optimal"]},{"id":"CuervoM24","title":"Scaling Properties of Speech Language Models","authors":["Santiago Cuervo","Ricard Marxer"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/CuervoM24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.21"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/CuervoM24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.21","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":9,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作关注的核心问题是：语音语言模型是否也遵循类似文本 LLM 的 scaling 规律，以及规律在哪里失效。过去 speech LM 往往被当成特殊系统单独调参，缺少像文本预训练那样清晰的参数-数据-损失关系，所以模型该做多大、tokenizer 该多细、数据该扩到哪里都缺少定量依据。","importance":"这是典型的 pretrain 方法论工作，贡献点在于把 scaling law 的视角带到 speech LM。它重要，不是因为单个模型分数更高，而是因为语音建模里 tokenization、层级离散单元、长序列成本都比文本更敏感；如果能明确哪些量按幂律缩放、哪些瓶颈来自离散化或上下文长度，就会直接影响 AudioLM、VALL-E 一类系统的资源分配和架构选型。","technical_approach":"核心方法大概率是系统性地缩放 speech LM 的参数量、训练 token、数据时长或离散单元配置，并拟合验证损失或下游生成质量随规模变化的趋势。和文本 scaling 不同，语音这里通常要同时处理 acoustic tokenizer 的码本大小、帧率、层级 token 以及更长的序列长度，因此关键设计不是单纯放大 Transformer，而是把'离散表示的效率'纳入 scaling 分析；如果论文做得好，应该会区分 compute-limited、data-limited 和 tokenizer-limited 三种区间，而不是给一个笼统的更大更好结论。","experiments":"从题目和元信息无法确认具体模型规模和数字结果。合理预期实验会报告不同参数规模在验证 perplexity 或生成相关指标上的缩放曲线，并分析语音 tokenizer 颗粒度、训练时长和上下文窗口的交互；最有价值的观察通常是某些区间里增加模型参数收益很快饱和，而改进离散化质量或增加有效上下文反而更划算，这类结论对统一多模态预训练尤其关键。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies whether speech language models obey usable scaling laws, and where those laws break. law 研究主要集中在 dense transformer 上，MoE（Mixture of Experts）模型的 scaling 行为与 dense 模型有何异同，缺乏系统的对比分析。这对于在给定计算预算下选择 dense 还是 MoE 架构至关重要。","importance":"范式级贡献，直接服务于 pretrain 架构选择和资源分配决策。MoE 在相同计算量下通常能获得更好的 loss，但其 scaling 曲线的形状、拐点、以及与 dense 模型的交叉点是实际工程决策的关键信息。这类对比分析对大规模 pretrain 团队有直接参考价值。","technical_approach":"在统一的实验框架下，同时训练不同规模的 dense 和 MoE 模型，拟合各自的 scaling law 曲线。关键控制变量包括总参数量、激活参数量、训练 token 数、专家数量等。通过对比两类模型在相同 FLOPs 下的 loss 表现，分析 MoE 的 scaling 效率优势及其边界条件。","experiments":"训练了多个规模点的 dense 和 MoE 模型进行对比。核心发现：MoE 在相同 FLOPs 下确实优于 dense，但优势随规模增大的变化趋势、以及专家数量对 scaling 效率的影响是关键新发现。具体模型规模范围和拟合公式需查原文。这类工作的价值在于提供可外推的定量关系。","authors_note":"Min Zhang 可能来自哈工大或苏州大学，在 NLP 基础研究方向有长期积累。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Scaling law research has focused on dense transformers; how MoE models scale compared to dense models lacks systematic comparative analysis. This is critical for choosing between dense and MoE architectures under a given compute budget.","importance":"Paradigm-level contribution directly serving pretrain architecture selection and resource allocation. MoE typically achieves better loss at the same compute, but the shape of its scaling curve, inflection points, and crossover with dense models are key engineering decisions. Highly valuable for large-scale pretrain teams.","technical_approach":"Trains dense and MoE models at multiple scales within a unified experimental framework, fitting scaling law curves for each. Mixture-of-Experts (MoEs) present an efficient alternative to dense models, while the existing methods to convert pretrained dense models to MoEs is limited to ReLU-based models with natural sparsity. This paper introduces G-MoEfication, applicable to arbitrary dense models, where ReLU-based activation sparsity assumptions no longer hold. For generalizations, we encounter the dilemma of needing to zero-out deactivated experts, while also avoiding excessive zeroing-out to retain dense activation information. We publicly release our code and report results conducted with mBERT, SantaCoder-1.1B, Phi-2-2.7B, and Falcon-7B demonstrating the efficacy of our approach in general scenarios: from multitask to multilingual, from fine-tuning to zero-shot weak-to-strong learning 多在分类或较简单任务上讨论，复杂推理场景更难，因为监督不只是标签而是一整条 reasoning chain，直接模仿弱监督会把系统性错误、捷径和脆弱的中间步骤一起蒸馏进去。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在方法层和训练范式层。它说明 weak-to-strong 不只适用于静态答案监督，也可以扩展到 reasoning data 的自举式改进；对 pretrain/post-train 接口的启示是，当高质量人工推理标注稀缺时，强模型可以通过逐步清洗和重写训练信号来减少对更强教师或人工标注的依赖。边界也很明确：它更像一种后训练阶段的数据改写与自训练框架，而不是从根上改变基础模型的推理机制。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个 progressive learning For pretrain-adjacent research, the useful takeaway is not a new base architecture, but a practical recipe for improving training signals without relying on stronger external teachers. The key choice is to shift from one-shot distillation to staged data improvement. Relative to standard self-training, the hard part here is not only pseudo-label confidence, but the quality of reasoning chains. The likely design is a controlled comparison across monolingual, small-multilingual, and massively multilingual setups over 250 languages, with attention to resource level and training allocation, to identify when shared modeling helps transfer and when it induces interference; that is a different goal from the usual multilingual paper that mainly tries to prove multilingual training works.","experiments":"The only hard fact available here is the 250-language experimental scope, which is already unusually broad. 建模工作，而且问题选得很对。tokenizer 是 LLM 里一个长期被当作外设处理、但实际上强烈影响跨语言泛化、长尾词建模和多模态统一接口的组件；如果能用稀疏表示把 tokenizer-free generative LM 做到可训练、可扩展，它对统一字符/字节/离散模态建模都有方法级意义。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 T-FREE：用 sparse representations 做 memory-efficient embeddings，从而实现 subword tokenizer-free 的生成式 LLM。直观上，它不是把每个原子符号映射成大而稠密的独立向量，而是通过稀疏组合编码来降低参数和激活开销，重点解决的是 embedding 层这类 tokenizer-free 模型最先爆炸的部位；与字节级或字符级模型直接硬上不同，它的设计选择是把表示能力保留在组合空间里，而不是简单缩小 hidden size。这样做有效，是因为原子词表小但序列长，瓶颈更多在每步表征效率而不是字表本身；代价则是训练和实现更复杂，且是否能保持与 subword 相当的优化稳定性要看实验。","experiments":"给定信息没有摘要，无法确认使用了多大模型和哪些基线。合理预期会与标准 Tokenizer-free modeling is attractive, but in practice character- or byte-level generation inflates sequence length and makes embedding and output layers expensive enough to be a serious scaling bottleneck.","importance":"This is directly relevant pretraining work. Tokenization is not a minor preprocessing detail: it affects multilingual transfer, long-tail lexical modeling, and how easily language models can unify with other discrete modalities. A memory-efficient tokenizer-free generator would therefore matter at the method level, not just as a niche engineering tweak.","technical_approach":"T-FREE appears to use sparse representations to build memory-efficient embeddings for tokenizer-free generative LLMs. The key idea is likely to replace large dense symbol embeddings with sparse compositional codes, reducing parameter and activation cost where tokenizer-free models suffer most; compared with straightforward byte- or character-level baselines, this keeps representational capacity in a structured embedding space instead of simply shrinking the model. That design makes sense because the real bottleneck is often per-step representation efficiency under long sequences, though the trade-off is added implementation complexity and potentially harder optimization.","experiments":"The metadata does not provide exact model sizes or numbers. Translationese is translated text with a distinctive statistical profile shaped by source-language interference and more explicit wording. It has been studied in translation and linguistics, but much less as a controllable pretraining data source.","importance":"This is a data-quality and data-mixture question. The pretraining takeaway is that readable text is not all interchangeable: translated text has its own distributional bias, which might help by making mappings more explicit or hurt by shifting the model away from native language statistics. That matters especially for multilingual pretraining.","technical_approach":"The likely method is to treat translationese as an explicit corpus condition and compare pretraining with native text, translated text, and mixtures of the two. Many continual-learning approaches address this with replay or regularization, but they do not directly control where the update should go.","importance":"Its value is in reframing continual pretraining as an optimization-localization problem. For pretraining research, that is useful because it suggests a more direct handle than global stability penalties: as models grow and knowledge becomes more modular, controlling the spatial footprint of updates may matter more than simply constraining total drift.","technical_approach":"The method is gradient localization, meaning the model restricts or steers gradients toward parameter regions most relevant to the incoming data. This likely keeps the standard LM objective and modifies the optimization path with some form of parameter selection, gating, or local update rule. Compared with replay or EWC-style methods that mainly protect old knowledge, this approach seems to focus on shrinking the write radius of new knowledge. That is a sensible design because catastrophic forgetting often comes from updates propagating too widely, not just from the strength of the new task. The trade-off is clear: too much localization can block useful transfer and reduce adaptation quality.","experiments":"The crucial empirical claim should be twofold: better retention of previous capabilities and no major slowdown in learning new data. Strong baselines would include vanilla continued pretraining, replay-based methods, and parameter-efficient adaptation approaches. Useful ablations would test localization granularity, how masks or gates are derived, and robustness under small versus large domain shifts. Rather than asking how performance scales given a dataset, it asks what the scaling response reveals about the dataset’s usefulness. This is a stronger proxy than static quality scores because it is tied to effective utilization during training. The intuition is that good data should support efficient learning, stable scaling trends, and consistent gains across model sizes.","experiments":"The expected experiments compare data selected by ScalingFilter against random selection, heuristic cleaning, or perplexity-based filtering under fixed token or compute budgets. seq2seq text diffusion 采样太慢的问题。文本 diffusion 的优点通常是更灵活的生成顺序和潜在更好的全局建模，但它长期被回避的核心障碍就是推理步数远多于 AR 解码，放到条件生成任务里尤其不实用。","importance":"这项工作的重要性在于，它直接打在 diffusion LM 最大的现实瓶颈上。对新型语言建模范式研究来说，很多 paper 证明了 diffusion 能做文本，但真正限制落地的是 sampling cost；如果 seq2seq 场景能明显加速，说明 diffusion 不只是一个离线研究对象，而有机会进入机器翻译、摘要、改写这类条件生成训练栈。它属于方法级改进，但对范式竞争力有实质影响。","technical_approach":"核心方法应该是为 seq2seq text diffusion 设计更快的采样策略，而不是改变任务定义。常见有效路径包括减少去噪步数、学习跳步采样、使用更好的初值、或把条件信息更强地注入去噪过程，从而减少无效迭代。和通用 diffusion 加速不同，seq2seq 的特殊点在于源序列提供了较强约束，因此采样可以更激进；代价是如果跳步过多，输出多样性和条件一致性可能一起受损。","experiments":"题面没有给出具体模型规模、任务、步数缩减比例和质量指标，因此不能编造。合理预期实验会覆盖机器翻译、摘要或数据到文本生成，对比标准 diffusion 采样、可能的非自回归 seq2seq baseline 和 AR baseline，报告速度—质量 trade-off。最有价值的观察通常是：在多少采样步以内性能基本不掉、哪些任务最受益、以及速度收益是否随序列长度扩大。","authors_note":"作者中包括 Zhouhan Lin。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses the main practical weakness of seq2seq text diffusion: sampling is too slow. Diffusion-based text generation is attractive because it relaxes strict left-to-right generation and can model global structure differently from AR models, but in conditional generation settings its long denoising chain has made it hard to justify in practice.","importance":"This matters because sampling cost is the bottleneck that has kept diffusion language models from being competitive beyond research demos. If seq2seq diffusion can be sped up materially, it becomes more relevant to real conditional generation pipelines such as translation, summarization, and rewriting. So while this is a method-level contribution, it has paradigm-level implications for whether diffusion is operationally viable in NLP.","technical_approach":"The method is likely a faster sampling scheme tailored to seq2seq text diffusion rather than a new task formulation. The usual effective levers are fewer denoising steps, learned skip schedules, better initialization, or stronger conditioning so the reverse process wastes less effort. What makes seq2seq special is that the source sequence already constrains the target space, which should permit more aggressive acceleration than in unconditional text generation. The trade-off is predictable: if the process is truncated too much, quality and faithfulness can both fall.","experiments":"The provided metadata does not include model size, datasets, step counts, or exact gains, so those details cannot be stated as facts. embedding/hidden state 的各向异性。过去这两个问题通常分别处理，但作者认为它们都和模型过度依赖浅层共现统计有关，因此可以通过句法平滑来同时缓解。","importance":"这项工作是典型的 pretrain 方法级改进。它的重要性不在于颠覆训练范式，而在于指出：即使标准 LM loss 在困惑度上正常下降，内部表示仍可能被高频 token Diab","Virginia Smith"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MuhamedLWDS24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.835"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MuhamedLWDS24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.835","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：LLM 训练的梯度和优化器状态太占显存，导致低成本训练受限。常见办法是激活重算、ZeRO、量化或低秩更新，但这些方法要么牺牲吞吐，要么改变可训练参数形态。GRASS 从标题看选择另一条路：直接让梯度结构化稀疏，从而同时省显存和算力。","importance":"这是一个很典型的训练系统/优化方法工作，对 pretrain 有直接意义。因为在大模型训练里，显存不是单点问题，而是 batch size、序列长度、并行策略和优化器选择的联动约束。如果 structured sparse gradients 能稳定训练，它的意义不只是省内存，还可能改变有效 batch 和硬件利用率的上限。边界在于：梯度稀疏若破坏优化质量，省下来的系统收益会被收敛变差抵消。","technical_approach":"从标题判断，GRASS 的核心是设计一种结构化梯度稀疏方案，让训练时只保存或更新一部分梯度块，而不是做非结构化 top-k 压缩。结构化的关键好处是更符合 GPU/TPU 张量运算和通信模式，工程上比随机稀疏更可落地。与传统 gradient sparsification 相比，这类方法通常更关心 end-to-end training memory，而不是只做分布式通信压缩；因此重点会在稀疏模式如何选、如何保持无偏或低偏更新、以及与优化器状态如何兼容。","experiments":"虽然没有摘要，但论文标题已经表明实验至少会评估两件事：compute efficiency 和 low-memory training。值得看的硬指标包括峰值显存、tokens/s、最终困惑度或下游精度，相对 dense training 的差距，以及不同稀疏率下的稳定性。若论文只在中小模型上成立，结论对真正的 pretrain 价值有限；若能在较长上下文和多卡训练下证明吞吐与质量兼得，实用价值会很高。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper likely targets a core bottleneck in LLM training: gradients and optimizer states consume too much memory, which limits affordable training. GRASS appears to pursue a different angle by enforcing structured sparsity in gradients.","importance":"This is directly relevant to pretraining because memory is not an isolated issue; it constrains batch size, context length, optimizer choice, and parallelism strategy. The main risk is optimization degradation, which would erase the systems benefit.","technical_approach":"From the title, GRASS likely proposes a structured gradient sparsification scheme that stores or applies only selected gradient blocks during training. In practice, several mid-flight changes are required in the LR schedule either manually, or with careful choices around warmup steps, peak LR, type of decay and restarts. To study this further, we consider the effect of switching the learning rate at a predetermined time during training, which we refer to as “SkipLR”. We model SGD as a stochastic gradient flow and show that when starting from the same initial parameters, switching the learning rate causes the loss curves to contract towards each other. We demonstrate this theoretically for some simple cases, and empirically on large language models. Our analysis provides insight into how learning rate schedules affect the training dynamics, and could inform the design of new schedules to accelerate Compared with explicit preference learning, it aims to bypass labeled comparisons. A fundamental challenge in this method lies in ensuring that the reward model accurately understands and evaluates human preferences. Current methods rely on ranking losses to teach the reward model to assess preferences, but they are susceptible to noise and ambiguous data, often failing to deeply understand human intentions. To address this issue, we introduce contrastive learning into the reward modeling process. In addition to supervised ranking loss, we introduce an unsupervised contrastive loss to enable the reward model to fully capture the distinctions in contrastive data. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed contrastive learning-based reward modeling method effectively enhances the generalization of the reward model, stabilizes the reinforcement learning training process, and improves the final alignment with human preferences.","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ChenZWJHYZZXGZ024","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.852"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ChenZWJHYZZXGZ024","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.852","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{},"summary_en":{},"tags":["rlhf","reward-model","contrastive-learning","alignment"]},{"id":"DangAMKUH24","title":"RLHF Goodman","Michael Frank"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FengGF24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.1231"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FengGF24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.1231","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要回答一个长期被默认接受、但很少被系统验证的问题：儿童导向语料（child-directed speech, CDS）到底是不是训练语言模型的高效数据。很多关于人类语言习得的讨论会把 CDS 视作高质量输入，但对现代 LM 来说，数据价值不只取决于“是否自然、是否面向学习者”，还取决于覆盖面、重复度、句法分布和 token 效率，所以这个假设值得重新量化。","importance":"这项工作的意义主要在数据级和训练语料设计层面。它不一定直接提出新模型，但会影响我们如何理解“高质量小数据”与“大规模杂数据”的权衡，尤其是在小模型、低资源预训练和 curriculum 设计里。如果结论是否定或有条件成立，那么它提醒 pretrain 研究不要把人类习得输入直接等同于模型最优训练分布；如果结论是部分肯定，那也会告诉我们 CDS 有效的成分到底来自简化句法、语用重复，还是交互场景约束。","technical_approach":"核心做法应当是把 CDS 当作一种可控训练分布，和成人语言、书面文本或其他自然语料做严格对照。方法上更像数据研究而不是新架构：控制 token 预算、模型大小和训练设置，比较不同语料对语言建模与泛化的影响。最关键的设计点不是简单地“拿 CDS 单独训一个模型”，而是要排除规模与域差异的混淆，看单位 token 信息量、组合搭配能力和 OOD 泛化是否真的更好。与过往基于认知启发的直觉讨论相比，这类实验的价值在于把‘像儿童输入’拆成可度量的数据属性。","experiments":"从标题看，实验应围绕“CDS 是否比其他语料更高效”展开，重点会是等 token、等参数、等训练步数下的 perplexity、词汇/句法泛化或儿童语言相关评测。最有价值的观察通常包括：CDS 在小数据 regime 是否更强；随着数据量增大，其优势是否消失；混合训练是否优于纯 CDS；以及收益究竟来自词汇频率重排还是句法简化。由于没有摘要，无法确认具体模型规模、语料来源、评测集和数值结果。","authors_note":"作者包含 Noah D. Goodman","Michael Frank"]},{"id":"FengYT24","title":"Long Sequence Modeling with Attention Tensorization: From Sequence to Tensor Learning","authors":["Aosong Feng","Rex Ying","Leandros Tassiulas"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FengYT24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.FINDINGS-EMNLP.858"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FengYT24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.findings-emnlp.858","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作试图解决长序列建模里一个老问题：标准注意力在序列长度上二次复杂度，靠稀疏化、线性化或状态压缩虽然能省算力，但往往牺牲表达力，尤其在跨远距离和高阶依赖上退化明显。作者给出的方向是不要只把输入看作一维序列，而是重排成张量后在更结构化的空间里做建模。","importance":"这项工作属于方法级，并且对长上下文 pretrain 有潜在系统影响。它的重要性不在于又给出一个 attention 近似，而在于提出了“从 sequence learning 到 tensor learning”的表示转移：如果成立，它提供了一条不同于稀疏注意力、RWKV、SSM 的路线。对预训练的启示是，长序列效率问题不一定只能通过削弱交互来解决，也可以通过重构输入几何形状来改善计算与归纳偏置。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 attention tensorization：把长序列映射为更高阶的张量结构，再在这个结构上执行注意力或等价的交互计算。它看起来像原创框架，而不是简单把二维 attention 换个实现。关键设计选择应包括如何把 token 序列 reshape 成张量、如何在不同维度上分解或共享注意力、以及如何保证这种重排不会破坏顺序信息。与常见长序列方法相比，它不是显式裁剪可见边，也不是低秩近似全部交互，而是试图利用张量结构把全局依赖拆解到多个较短轴上。这样设计可能有效，因为许多序列依赖在适当重排后具有局部或可分离结构；边界在于若任务依赖原生线性顺序且不可分解，tensorization 可能引入额外归纳偏差。","experiments":"实验上最关键的不是单点精度，而是长度扩展时的性能-成本曲线。合理预期包括在 Long Range Arena、长文本语言建模或合成长依赖任务上，与标准 Transformer、线性 attention、稀疏 attention 或 SSM 类方法比较。最有价值的结果会是：在相近显存/吞吐下更好的长程建模，或者在相近精度下明显更长的可处理上下文。若作者做得扎实，还应包含 tensor 形状选择、不同分解方式、以及长度外推的 ablation。没有摘要，无法确认具体模型参数和数字。","authors_note":"作者包含 Rex Ying。其过往在图学习和高效表示学习方面有代表性工作，因此这篇论文把序列重参数化为张量结构是有明显研究延续性的。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a familiar bottleneck in long-context modeling: standard attention scales quadratically with sequence length, and many efficient variants save compute by giving up expressive interactions. The proposed angle is to stop treating the input as a purely 1D sequence and instead model it as a tensorized object.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with possible systems relevance for long-context pretraining. The interesting part is not just another attention approximation, but a different representation strategy: move from sequence learning to tensor learning. If that works, it opens a path distinct from sparse attention, linear attention, or state-space compression.","technical_approach":"The core idea is attention tensorization: reshape or map a long sequence into a higher-order tensor, then perform attention-like interactions over that structured object. This appears to be an original framework rather than a small implementation tweak. The important design choices are how the sequence is tensorized, how interactions are factorized across axes, and how positional information is preserved. Compared with standard efficient-attention methods, the goal is not to prune edges or low-rank approximate everything, but to exploit structure after reparameterizing the input geometry. That can help if dependencies become more local or separable in the tensor view. The risk is the opposite case: tasks that rely heavily on the native linear order may suffer from the induced bias.","experiments":"The key evidence should be performance versus cost as context length grows, not just one fixed-length result. Reasonable evaluations would include long-range synthetic tasks, long-context language modeling, or benchmarks like Long Range Arena, compared against Transformers, sparse or linear attention, and possibly SSM-style baselines. The most informative findings would show either better quality under matched memory/throughput, or longer feasible context under matched quality. Useful ablations would cover tensor shapes, factorization choices, and extrapolation to longer lengths. No abstract is provided, so exact scales and numbers cannot be stated confidently.","authors_note":"The author list includes Rex Ying, known for work in graph learning and efficient representation learning. The tensorized view of sequences is consistent with that broader line of research."},"tags":["long-context","attention","tensorization","sequence-modeling"],"notable_authors":["Rex Ying"]},{"id":"FerrandoV24","title":"Information Flow Routes: Automatically Interpreting Language Models at Scale","authors":["Javier Ferrando","Elena Voita"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FerrandoV24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.965"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FerrandoV24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.965","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是解释性方法一个很现实的瓶颈：能做细致因果分析，但扩展不到大模型、大数据和大批量样本。很多 mechanistic interpretability 工具一次只能解释一个样本或一小段路径，人工成本高，结果也难系统化，因此作者试图自动化地恢复模型中的信息流路由。","importance":"这项工作的价值在于把解释性从‘手工 case study’往‘可规模化分析工具’推进了一步。对 pretrain 研究者来说，这很重要，因为很多关于知识存储、跨层协作、头的分工、ICL 路径的判断，之所以长期停留在猜测，不是问题不重要，而是工具吞吐不够。若信息流路由可以自动挖掘，就有机会把机制分析纳入日常训练诊断，而不是只在论文里做示例图。","technical_approach":"核心方法是自动识别 language model 中的信息流路径，也就是从输入特征到输出决策之间哪些层、哪些头、哪些残差通道构成了主要路由。它看起来像把已有的 patching / attribution / causal mediation 思想系统化，形成可批量运行的 route extraction 框架。与只看 token-level attribution 或单组件重要性不同，信息流路由更关注‘组合路径’——哪些模块串联起来才真正承担计算。这样设计有效，是因为很多 LM 计算并不落在单个 head 上，而是依赖跨层接力；难点在于自动化后容易引入近似误差，需要在精度和可扩展性之间折中。","experiments":"实验上最关键的不是单个可解释案例，而是规模化后是否仍能得到稳定且有因果意义的路径。合理预期包括在多种任务或语言现象上，与人工分析、已有 attribution 方法或 causal baselines 比较；指标可能涉及路径复现率、干预后性能下降、解释稀疏性以及运行成本。最有价值的 ablation 会是不同路径搜索策略、不同近似层级，以及 route 数量对忠实度的影响。没有摘要和数字，无法进一步确认模型规模和具体结果。","authors_note":"作者 Elena Voita 在神经网络解释性、注意力分析和高效建模方面有代表性工作。这篇论文延续了她把局部可视化提升为系统分析方法的研究脉络。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical bottleneck in interpretability: many causal analysis tools are insightful but do not scale to large models, many examples, or broad empirical coverage. We often get detailed case studies, but not a systematic picture of how information flows through a model at scale.","importance":"Its main contribution is methodological, with strong implications for training analysis. For pretraining researchers, this matters because questions about knowledge storage, layer cooperation, head specialization, and in-context learning mechanisms often remain unresolved simply because our tools are too low-throughput. If information-flow routes can be extracted automatically, interpretability becomes more usable as a routine diagnostic.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to automatically identify information-flow routes in language models: which layers, heads, and residual pathways jointly carry the computation from relevant input features to the final prediction. This appears to systematize ideas from patching, attribution, and causal mediation into a scalable route-extraction framework. The important distinction is that it seeks structured multi-component paths, not just per-token attribution scores or single-module importance. That is a better match to how many LM computations actually work, since behavior often depends on chains of modules rather than isolated units. The trade-off is between scalability and faithfulness: more automation usually means more approximation.","experiments":"The decisive evidence should show that the extracted routes remain stable and causally meaningful at scale. Wallace","David Bau"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FeuchtAWB24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.543"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FeuchtAWB24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.543","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作关注一个很具体但很有意思的问题：LLM 里可能存在 tokenizer 词表之外的“隐式词项”，而它们平时不直接可见。过去我们常把模型的词汇知识等同于显式 token 词表，但实际模型可能通过多 token 组合、内部特征复用和训练共现，形成对某些词或短语的整体性表征；作者试图用 token erasure 这一现象去抓到这种隐藏结构的足迹。","importance":"这项工作的贡献主要在机制分析和 tokenizer/表示学习理解上。它的重要性在于提醒我们：离散词表不等于模型内部有效词汇表。对 pretrain 来说，这会影响我们如何看待 tokenizer 设计、merge 规则、跨词边界组合以及词汇压缩效率；对 interpretability 来说，它说明很多语义单元可能不是单 token 对应，而是分布式、可触发的隐式单元。","technical_approach":"核心方法应当是观察或诱导 token erasure——删除、屏蔽或干预某些 token 后，模型行为暴露出它原本依赖某个隐式 lexical item 的证据。它不是单纯做 saliency，而是在寻找这样一种现象：即便一个词没有作为单独 token 出现，模型内部仍像处理一个整体词汇单位那样在响应。与传统 probing 不同，这里不只是问某层能不能线性读出某个词义，而是看干预输入后是否出现结构化缺失，进而反推出隐式词项的存在。这样的方法有说服力，因为它依赖行为后果和因果痕迹，而不是只看表示相似度；边界在于 erasure 现象也可能由上下文补偿失败或 tokenization artifact 引起，需要强对照排除。","experiments":"实验价值主要取决于能否系统地区分‘隐式词项’与普通上下文依赖。合理预期包括在不同 tokenizer、不同模型规模、不同词形构造上测试 token erasure 的稳定性，并可能结合 activation patching 或 representation analysis 做验证。关键结果应是：哪些词类或多 token 片段最容易形成隐式词项；这种现象是否随模型规模增强；以及显式加入词表后行为如何变化。没有摘要，无法确认具体数据集、模型和数值指标。","authors_note":"作者包含 David Bau。其长期工作聚焦于神经网络内部概念、单元解释与可干预分析，因此这篇论文延续了“把模型内部概念对象化”的研究路线。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a subtle but important question: language models may contain implicit vocabulary items that do not correspond directly to tokenizer entries. We often treat the explicit token vocabulary as the model’s actual lexical inventory, but models can still build coherent internal representations for multi-token words or phrases through co-occurrence and feature reuse.","importance":"This is mainly a representation and interpretability contribution, with implications for tokenization. The key takeaway is that the tokenizer vocabulary is not the same thing as the model’s effective vocabulary. That matters for pretraining because it changes how we think about merge rules, lexical compression, and compositional boundaries inside the model.","technical_approach":"The method appears to use token erasure as a footprint of hidden lexical structure. The idea is not just to compute saliency, but to look for behavioral signatures showing that the model treats some multi-token pattern as a unified lexical item even when no single token represents it. Compared with standard probing, this is more causal: instead of asking whether a representation contains information, it asks whether removing specific tokens reveals dependence on an implicit lexical unit. That is a stronger angle, though it comes with an important caveat: erasure effects can also arise from generic context disruption or tokenization artifacts, so controls are essential.","experiments":"The empirical strength of the paper should depend on whether it can separate implicit lexical items from ordinary context effects. 对齐里很多有用信号天然是序列级分数，但现有 RLHF/PPO 类方法要么训练复杂、要么样本效率低，而纯监督方法又很难直接优化这类非 token 级目标。作者试图在“能用 sequence-level reward”与“训练尽量像 supervised learning 一样稳”之间找一个中间点。","importance":"这项工作的意义在于 posttrain 方法级，但对 pretrain/posttrain 接口也有启发。它重要的地方不是再做一个 policy gradient 变体，而是如果真能把序列级偏好优化做得更像监督训练，就能降低 RL 对大规模对齐的工程门槛。对做合成数据、自蒸馏和 preference optimization 的团队，这类方法可能意味着更低方差、更简单训练栈，以及更容易和已有 SFT 管线融合。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 Contrastive Policy Gradient。按题目判断，它应当把 policy gradient 的序列级优化目标与对比式学习信号结合起来，用正负序列或偏好对来构造更稳定的梯度估计。与 PPO 这种显式在线 RL 不同，它可能更接近离线、监督友好的优化形式；与 DPO 这类纯偏好分类目标相比，它又保留了 level, but RL-style optimization is often unstable and expensive, while plain supervised learning does not directly optimize those scores. The goal is to get the benefits of sequence-level optimization without paying the full cost of RLHF-style training.","importance":"This is a post-training method contribution with clear relevance to the pretrain–posttrain interface. The interesting promise is not just another policy-gradient variant, but a way to make sequence-level alignment feel more like supervised optimization: lower variance, simpler tooling, and easier integration with existing SFT pipelines.","technical_approach":"The method is Contrastive Policy Gradient. From the title, it likely combines policy-gradient optimization with a contrastive training signal built from positive and negative sequences or preference pairs. Relative to PPO, this would be more supervised-friendly and likely less dependent on heavy online RL machinery. Relative to DPO-like methods, it seems to preserve direct use of sequence-level scores instead of reducing everything to preference classification. The design makes sense because contrastive structure can stabilize gradients and reduce reward-scale issues while still keeping a sequence-level learning signal. The trade-off is that it may rely on good contrast construction and may help less when rewards are extremely sparse or poorly ranked.","experiments":"The main empirical questions should be whether it is more stable than PPO-style methods, more effective than reward-weighted SFT, and more faithful to sequence-level optimization than DPO-style baselines. Sun","Bowen Sun","Huimin Chen","Ruobing Xie","Jie Zhou","Yankai Lin","Zhiyuan Liu","Maosong Sun"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/GuoCY0SSCXZL0024","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.85"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/GuoCY0SSCXZL0024","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.85","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：现有 preference optimization 往往把对齐目标压成单一标量，难以同时、可控地满足多个目标，比如 helpfulness、harmlessness、style 和长度。过去常见做法是混合数据或调 prompt，但这些手段控制粒度粗，而且目标一冲突就容易互相覆盖。","importance":"这项工作的贡献在对齐方法级，对 pretrain 的直接影响有限，但对 post-train 很实用。它的重要性不在于再做一次 DPO 变体，而在于把 alignment 从‘单目标最优’推进到‘多目标可调’，这更符合真实产品需求，也能反向帮助我们理解 reward 模型或偏好数据里不同维度是如何纠缠的。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 controllable preference optimization：在偏好学习目标里显式引入可控因子，使模型能按给定权重或条件在多个目标之间移动。最可能的实现方式是条件化的 preference objective、带属性标签的奖励分解、或在训练时加入控制向量，使同一模型学习一族 Pareto trade-off，而不是单点解。它和标准 DPO/IPO 的区别，不只是多加几个数据集，而是把‘偏好方向’本身参数化并在训练中学习。为什么有效：多目标冲突不是噪声，而是结构；只有把结构写进目标函数，模型才可能在推理时稳定可控。边界是，前提需要较干净的属性标注或可分解偏好信号，否则 controllability 可能只是表面现象。","experiments":"实验上，关键证据应是：在多个对齐维度上，模型可以随控制信号平滑移动，而不是只在单点上优。应比较 DPO 类 baseline、混合 SFT、可能还有 reward-model-guided decoding，并报告不同目标上的 Pareto frontier、控制精度和总体质量。由于摘要缺失，无法确认使用的模型、偏好数据和具体增益数值；最有价值的 ablation 应该是控制变量是否真正 disentangle 了目标，而不是靠 prompt wording 偶然触发。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real limitation of current preference optimization: alignment is usually collapsed into a single scalar objective, making it hard to satisfy multiple goals such as helpfulness, harmlessness, style, and brevity in a controllable way. Existing work often relies on mixed data or prompt tricks, which provide only coarse control and break down when objectives conflict.","importance":"This is a post-training method contribution with limited direct impact on pretraining, but strong practical relevance. Its importance is not just another DPO variant; it pushes alignment from single-objective optimization toward controllable multi-objective trade-offs, which is much closer to product reality and also helps diagnose how different preference dimensions are entangled in data and reward models.","technical_approach":"The core idea is controllable preference optimization: explicitly parameterize the alignment objective so the model can move along different trade-offs under user- or system-specified controls. The likely implementation is a conditional preference objective, decomposed reward or attribute signals, or a learned control vector that lets one model represent a family of Pareto solutions instead of a single optimum. The key difference from standard DPO or IPO is not simply using more datasets, but learning the preference direction itself as a controllable variable. This should help because multi-objective conflict is structured, not just noisy, and the training objective must expose that structure for inference-time control to be reliable. The limitation is that good controllability depends on reasonably clean attribute labels or decomposable preference signals.","experiments":"The critical empirical evidence should show that the model moves smoothly and predictably across multiple alignment dimensions when the control signal changes, rather than excelling only at one fixed operating point. Likely baselines include DPO-style training, mixed SFT, and perhaps reward-guided decoding, with metrics on Pareto frontiers, control fidelity, and overall response quality. This matters more for generative models because they are often less tolerant to quantization error than discriminative models. The target problem is the quality-efficiency trade-off in low-bit LLM compression.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution in compression, but it matters to pretraining-adjacent work because low-bit representations increasingly shape how pretrained checkpoints are stored, adapted, and served. If QAT can be made lighter while preserving generation quality, it changes the practical deployment envelope of large pretrained models. So the significance is not a new modeling paradigm, but a useful systems-facing improvement with direct implications for large-model lifecycle management.","technical_approach":"The method, DL-QAT, combines quantization-aware training with a weight-decomposed low-rank parameterization. Instead of adapting the full dense weight under quantization noise, it decomposes the weight and uses trainable low-rank components to absorb structured quantization error. The reasoning is straightforward: much of the damage from quantization is low-dimensional and does not require full-parameter correction. Relative to generic LoRA-style adaptation, the low-rank capacity here is explicitly used to repair quantization-induced distortion rather than to fit a downstream task.","experiments":"From the abstract, the empirical claim is improved low-bit quantization under lower training cost compared with standard QAT and related baselines. The broader lesson is that preference learning is sensitive not just to the direction of supervision but also to its granularity; if margin information can be used reliably, alignment may become both more sample-efficient and better calibrated.","technical_approach":"From the title, Margin Matching Preference Optimization augments preference training with an explicit notion of margin between chosen and rejected responses. Inference acceleration changes the practical cost model of large LMs and can feed back into training decisions, such as whether to train auxiliary predictors or optimize models specifically for speculative execution.","technical_approach":"EAGLE-2 introduces dynamic draft trees. Instead of proposing a single draft continuation, it generates a tree of candidate continuations and lets the target model verify them in parallel. The dynamic part is the important bit: compute is allocated adaptively based on local uncertainty rather than using a fixed tree template everywhere. This is a sensible design because token distributions vary sharply by context—some positions are near-deterministic and favor deeper drafting, while others are ambiguous and benefit from wider branching.","experiments":"The key evidence should be end-to-end latency speedups, throughput, acceptance rates, and quality retention across several LLM backbones, likely compared with EAGLE, Medusa, and standard speculative decoding. gives only weak pressure to learn syntax as a compositional structure, so models can rely on surface statistics and still do well. Prior work often sidestepped this with explicit parsing supervision, multitask setups, or simply more data; this paper instead asks whether pretraining on syntactic transformations can directly inject stronger structural bias.","importance":"The contribution matters at the objective-design level. It suggests that some forms of generalization may not emerge reliably from scale alone and may require pretraining signals that force the model to operate on structure, not just predict fluent continuations. That is especially relevant for small models, low-resource settings, and work on inductive bias. This is not a paradigm replacement, but it is a concrete alternative to the default 'just do LM harder' strategy.","technical_approach":"The method appears to pretrain models to perform syntactic transformations—rewriting sentences in ways that preserve meaning while altering structure. That is stronger than attaching parse labels, because the model must actually use structural information to produce a valid output sequence. A notable design advantage is that the task stays in natural-language sequence space, so it remains close to the LM interface. under a given prefix most tokens are essentially impossible. Earlier work improved this through softmax approximations, faster sampling, or static vocabulary pruning, but those methods do not tailor the candidate set to the current context.","importance":"Its contribution is to treat the vocabulary as context-dependent rather than globally fixed. That is interesting for both inference and pretraining because it can reduce wasted normalization cost, change how rare tokens are handled, and potentially loosen the coupling between tokenization and the output layer. The risk is obvious: if the dynamic candidate set misses needed tokens, quality can collapse in unrecoverable ways. So this is a method-level contribution with a clear efficiency-quality trade-off.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to construct a context-conditioned candidate vocabulary at each step, and score or decode only within that subset. This is more than frequency-based truncation: there must be a mechanism that predicts which tokens are plausible given the current hidden state or prefix. The design is attractive because language distributions are highly sparse, so a large fraction of the vocabulary contributes almost nothing at each step. Compared with static approaches like adaptive softmax, the distinguishing feature is that the candidate set changes with context. The hard constraint is recall—once the right token is pruned, later decoding cannot recover it.","experiments":"The experiments should jointly evaluate efficiency and quality: reduced compute per step, latency or FLOPs savings, and the impact on perplexity or generation metrics. curse”：模型学会了 A→B，却不会稳定地反推出 B→A。这个问题过去常被当成数据覆盖不足或提示方式问题处理，但它实际上暴露了自回归语言建模对关系对称性和事实双向泛化的系统性缺陷，因此值得单独分析和干预。","importance":"这项工作的价值主要在机制分析和训练信号设计，而不是提出一个新的大模型范式。对 pretrain 的启示是明确的：标准 next-token 目标并不保证关系知识的可逆表示，尤其当训练语料只单向陈述事实时，模型会形成方向性很强的记忆，这会影响知识编辑、检索增强训练和合成数据设计。","technical_approach":"论文的核心做法是先把 reversal curse benchmark SOTA，而是证明：同一事实在正向学得很好时，反向召回仍会显著掉点；而显式加入反向或更对称的训练信号后，这种差距能够被缩小。若论文做得扎实，最有价值的 ablation 会是模板多样性、事实频次和模型规模对 reversal gap 的影响。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies the reversal curse: a model can learn A→B but still fail to infer B→A reliably. This is often brushed off as missing coverage or prompting sensitivity, but the issue is more structural: autoregressive next-token training does not force relational knowledge to be represented symmetrically.","importance":"This is mainly a mechanistic and training-signal paper, not a new pretraining paradigm. The pretraining takeaway is important: memorizing facts in one direction is not the same as learning reversible knowledge, which matters for synthetic data generation, knowledge editing, and retrieval-oriented supervision.","technical_approach":"The core approach is to first operationalize the reversal curse with controlled evaluations, then test mitigation strategies that inject more bidirectional supervision. The common narrative contrasts parallel self-attention with sequential recurrence, but that contrast can hide the fact that Transformers also maintain and update distributed state across layers and positions.","importance":"This is an architectural interpretation contribution. If the Transformer can be cast as a multi-state recurrent system, then tools developed for reasoning about state updates, memory capacity, and recurrence may become applicable to Transformers as well, with implications for interpretability, long-context modeling, and hybrid model design.","technical_approach":"Judging from the title, the paper likely provides a formal rewriting of Transformer computation into a recurrent view with multiple interacting state variables. The point is not a loose analogy but a more operational recurrence-based description.","experiments":"Without the abstract, it is unclear whether the paper is mainly theoretical or includes empirical validation. Instead of training yet another judge or doing standard preference tuning, the authors ask whether dynamic rewards plus prompt optimization can produce reliable alignment without updating model weights.","importance":"This is a post-training method, but it matters for pretraining-adjacent research because it probes how much alignment structure already exists inside the base model and how much is merely a readout problem. If tuning-free self-alignment works well, that suggests some downstream alignment gains come from better elicitation rather than additional gradient updates. The limitation is straightforward: this can amplify existing capabilities, but it is unlikely to create them from scratch.","technical_approach":"The approach appears to combine prompt optimization with dynamically computed rewards so the model can iteratively improve its own outputs without parameter fine-tuning. The likely advantage over fixed self-critique prompts is robustness: dynamic rewards adapt evaluation to the current response, while prompt optimization stabilizes the judgment procedure itself. Compared with RLHF or DPO, the method removes explicit weight updates and expensive preference supervision, but shifts the burden to inference-time search and to the base model's intrinsic evaluative ability.","experiments":"The natural comparisons are against zero-shot prompting, fixed self-critique prompts, self-training alignment variants, and perhaps small-scale supervised or preference-tuned baselines. Prior work often treats ICL as a single input–output mapping, but separating these stages could explain why a model sometimes appears to 'know' the answer internally while failing to express it correctly in text.","importance":"Its value is primarily mechanistic. Typical interventions would include changing label names while preserving task structure, restricting output forms, comparing hidden-state classifiers with free-form generation, and probing whether correct task information appears in intermediate representations before it is expressed. The point is to localize failure: is the model failing to infer the task, or failing to say what it inferred?","experiments":"No abstract is available, so model names, task suites, and numerical gains cannot be stated confidently. Teams often reuse standard LLM pipelines, but languages differ sharply in script, morphology, data availability, and code-mixing, so the best tokenizer, data mix, and training strategy are unlikely to be universal.","importance":"This is directly important at the pretraining-methodology level. The main implication is that language-specific LLMs should not be treated as smaller copies of general English scaling recipes; tokenizer granularity, corpus cleaning, cross-lingual transfer, and continued-pretraining choices can dominate outcomes. A careful design study here is more reusable than a one-off leaderboard improvement.","technical_approach":"From the title, this is a design-space study rather than a new architecture. A single fixed learning-rate schedule is often a poor fit for this constrained re-optimization process.","importance":"This is a training-paradigm and optimization contribution. It matters for both pretraining and continual pretraining because version upgrading is effectively optimization near an existing basin under competing objectives: preserve prior capability, learn from new data, and remain stable. If the learning-rate trajectory strongly affects the outcome, then some upgrade failures are optimization-path failures rather than purely data failures.","technical_approach":"From the title, the key idea is learning-rate path switching: instead of using one schedule throughout the update, the training process switches between different LR paths across stages. The intuition is sensible: early stages may need conservative updates to retain prior behavior, while later stages may benefit from a schedule that better absorbs the new distribution or escapes a suboptimal region. Compared with a single cosine or monotonic decay schedule, this treats model updating as staged optimization. The central trade-off is timing and aggressiveness of the switch: too aggressive hurts stability, too conservative limits adaptation.","experiments":"The abstract is not provided, so the model family, update setting, and numerical gains cannot be stated reliably. Existing approaches often rely on speculative decoding, auxiliary draft models, or non-autoregressive distillation, but these either add system complexity or lose quality. Training the model to handle noisy context is therefore a meaningful alternative.","importance":"This is a training-for-serving paper with direct implications for pretraining. The key idea is that parallel inference capability may be partly learned, not only engineered at decoding time. If that holds, it changes how we think about teacher forcing, exposure bias, and the train-test mismatch in autoregressive LMs.","technical_approach":"The method appears to be noisy training: inject noise into the conditioning context so the model learns to make stable predictions even when the prefix is imperfect. Unlike standard teacher forcing, it does not assume the prefix is always correct. Unlike fully non-autoregressive methods, it still keeps conditional dependence. The reason this can work is simple: parallel decoding exposes the model to draft or uncertain tokens, and a model trained only on clean prefixes tends to amplify those errors.","experiments":"The main experiments are likely about the speed-quality trade-off: compare standard AR decoding, speculative or other parallel baselines, and measure throughput gains against perplexity or generation quality. Earlier explanations often stayed at a high level, such as pattern copying or implicit Bayesian updating, but framing Q/K as a two-tower metric learning system turns a vague phenomenon into a testable mechanism.","importance":"This is an important interpretability paper because it targets the working principle of ICL itself, which is closely tied to what pretraining can induce algorithmically. If the claim is right, the implication is that some in-context heads work less like general-purpose reasoning modules and more like retrieval systems that map queries and demonstrations into a comparable similarity space. That would inform how we think about attention structure, demonstration selection, and context compression.","technical_approach":"The main thesis is likely that the query and key projections in certain ICL heads behave like two towers in metric learning: one tower embeds the current query, the other embeds candidate demonstration tokens or examples, and attention scores implement similarity-based retrieval. This is stronger than the generic statement that attention finds relevant tokens, because it predicts a stable task-relevant metric space. 的关键难点：不同样本天然难度差异很大，直接看置信度高低容易混入能力因素；配对设计能尽量抵消题目难度和分布差异，让‘见过原题’成为主要可检信号。相比简单字符串近邻或 paraphrase 检测，它更强调统计可证性；边界在于 counterpart 构造质量非常关键，若配对样本并未真正保持同分布，检验就会偏。","experiments":"摘要明确表明作者先提出了 practical contamination detection: how to tell genuine generalization from memorized exposure when the training set is unknown. Many existing methods rely on heuristics such as similarity search, manual rewrites, or prompt-based probes, but these often lack strong statistical grounding and can confuse true capability with contamination.","importance":"This is a meaningful evaluation-governance contribution. For pretraining research, contamination is not a side issue; it affects how we interpret scaling gains, data choices, and even whether a new method really works. The value of PaCoST is that it tries to move contamination detection from ad hoc judgment toward a statistically testable procedure.","technical_approach":"PaCoST uses paired confidence significance testing. For each benchmark example, it constructs a counterpart drawn from the same distribution and then compares model confidence between the original and the paired sample using a paired statistical test. This is a sensible design because raw confidence is heavily confounded by item difficulty; pairing is meant to cancel out much of that variation so that unusual confidence on the original item becomes a stronger signal of prior exposure. Compared with nearest-neighbor or paraphrase-based heuristics, it emphasizes statistical validity. The main dependency is counterpart quality: if the pair is not truly distribution-matched, the test can be biased.","experiments":"The abstract clearly states that the paper first defines requirements for practical contamination detection and then evaluates PaCoST on LLM contamination detection. Retrieval for LLMs","authors":["Jintian Zhang","Cheng Peng","Mengshu Sun","Xiang Chen","Lei Liang","Zhiqiang Zhang","Jun Zhou","Huajun Chen","Ningyu Zhang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$27","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.05152","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ZhangPSCLZZC024","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.FINDINGS-EMNLP.237"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ZhangPSCLZZC024","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.findings-emnlp.237","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：生成和检索在 LLM 体系里通常被分开训练、分开执行，导致需要两套模型或两次前向，系统复杂且效率低。很多实际任务并不是“先检索再生成”这么干净，而是要求模型一边生成答案，一边给出可用于检索的表示或标识；现有做法把这两件事拆开，既浪费计算，也让训练目标彼此脱节。","importance":"它的贡献主要是系统级加方法级，对统一建模有明确启发。OneGen 的价值不在于把检索效果单独推到新 SOTA，而在于证明 retrieval 和 generation 可以被一个自回归 LLM 用单次前向统一处理。对 pretrain 研究者，这个方向值得注意，因为它在重新定义“LM 输出空间”：不只输出自然语言 token，也输出检索 token。这意味着检索能力可以被纳入语言建模接口，而不是永远依赖外接双塔编码器。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 One-pass unified generation and retrieval。作者把 retrieval token 设计成可由 LLM 自回归生成的特殊输出，从而把原本需要单独编码和匹配的检索过程并入生成流程。关键设计选择有两个。第一，不走传统 dual-encoder 或 generation+reretrieval 的两阶段路线，而是让一个模型在同一次解码中同时产出文本和检索相关标记，减少额外前向。第二，训练上桥接了原本割裂的目标，把检索学习从独立表示学习问题改写成序列生成问题的一部分。这样做有效的原因在于：模型不再需要在两个不连通的表示空间之间切换，检索条件和生成上下文可以共享同一隐状态；代价则是检索 token 的设计、监督构造和解码稳定性会变得很关键。","experiments":"根据摘要，作者在两个不同任务上做了实验，并强调了效率和统一性的收益，但摘要片段没有给出任务名称、模型参数量、数据规模、baseline 和具体提升数字，因此不能安全补充。可以确定的事实是：OneGen 旨在通过 unified forward pass 同时提升需要“检索+生成”的任务表现，并减少传统分离式流程的额外开销。对读者最值得关注的实验点，是它相对双塔检索器和标准 RAG pipeline 的精度-延迟权衡：如果精度接近但部署链路更短，这类方法就有实际价值；如果检索质量明显受损，它更像是系统简化而非能力替代。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical modeling gap: retrieval and generation are usually trained and executed as separate components, which means extra models, extra passes, and weak coupling between the two objectives. Many real tasks need both at once, not a clean retrieve-then-generate split, yet current pipelines keep them disconnected.","importance":"This is a system-plus-method contribution with clear relevance to unified modeling. The main value of OneGen is not merely better retrieval in isolation, but the claim that retrieval and generation can be handled by a single autoregressive LLM in one forward pass. For pretraining-minded readers, the broader implication is important: the LM output space need not be limited to natural-language tokens. If retrieval tokens can be generated autoregressively, retrieval becomes part of the language-modeling interface rather than something permanently outsourced to a separate encoder stack.","technical_approach":"The core idea is a one-pass framework that unifies generation and retrieval by introducing retrieval tokens that the LLM generates autoregressively. Two design choices matter most. First, instead of a dual-encoder retriever or a two-stage generate-then-retrieve setup, the model emits both text and retrieval-related symbols in the same decoding process, which reduces extra forward passes. Second, the training objective bridges two tasks that are usually disconnected, effectively rewriting retrieval as part of sequence generation. This can work because the model no longer needs to switch across separate representation spaces: retrieval cues and generation context share the same hidden states. The cost is that retrieval-token design, supervision construction, and decoding stability become central bottlenecks.","experiments":"From the abstract, the authors evaluate on two distinct tasks and emphasize efficiency and unification benefits, but the provided abstract fragment does not include task names, model sizes, datasets, baselines, or exact metrics. The safe conclusion is that OneGen is designed to improve tasks requiring both retrieval and generation while reducing the overhead of conventional separated pipelines. The most important thing to inspect in the full paper is the accuracy-latency trade-off against dual-encoder retrievers and standard RAG systems. If quality stays close while the pipeline becomes materially simpler, the method is practically meaningful; if retrieval quality drops too much, the result is more about system simplification than true capability replacement.","authors_note":""},"tags":["retrieval","generation","unified-modeling","rag"]},{"id":"Zhao0FS24","title":"Unveiling In-Context Learning: A Coordinate System to Understand Its Working Mechanism","authors":["Anhao Zhao","Fanghua Ye","Jinlan Fu","Xiaoyu Shen"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/Zhao0FS24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.689"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/Zhao0FS24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.689","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文想解决的是 ICL 机制研究里一个长期存在的混乱：大家都在讨论 in-context learning 为什么有效，但经常把不同因素混在一起，导致结论彼此难比较。作者提出一个“坐标系”来理解 ICL，说明他们的目标不是再给一个局部解释，而是整理出一套能区分不同工作机制的分析框架。","importance":"这类工作的重要性在于机制分析层面，而不是直接提模型分数。对 pretrain 研究，它很有价值，因为 ICL 是大模型能力里最接近“无需梯度更新的快速适应”接口；如果不能把其作用因素拆开，我们很难判断究竟是预训练记忆、模式匹配、隐式梯度下降，还是任务条件化在起主要作用。一个好的坐标系能帮助后续实验更可比，也能减少很多概念混用。","technical_approach":"从标题看，作者的做法不是提出单一机理，而是构建一个分析坐标系统，把 ICL 的可能工作机制投影到若干互相可区分的维度上。常见可区分维度可能包括：任务是否在预训练中见过、示例是在提供标签映射还是提供推理轨迹、模型是在做 nearest-neighbor style matching 还是在内部形成更新样式的状态变化。和以往只用一组 toy task 论证某个机制不同，这种坐标系方法更像元分析框架：它的价值在于告诉你什么实验能区分什么假设，哪些现象其实是不同机制叠加。有效性取决于两个条件：维度划分是否足够正交，以及是否能落到可测量的实验设计上。","experiments":"摘要缺失，因此无法给出作者测试了哪些模型、哪些基准和哪些定量结论。可以确定的是，实验应该围绕坐标系的解释力展开，也就是用多个任务和设置展示现有 ICL 现象可以被该框架更清楚地定位。对资深读者，关键不在于作者是否“解释了全部 ICL”，而在于这个框架是否真能产生可证伪预测：例如改变示例顺序、标签空间、预训练暴露或模型规模时，不同坐标位置是否表现出系统性差异。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a long-standing problem in in-context learning research: people keep asking why ICL works, but different explanations are often mixed together, making results hard to compare. By proposing a “coordinate system,” the authors appear to aim for a structured framework rather than yet another isolated mechanism claim.","importance":"This matters at the mechanism-analysis level rather than through benchmark gains. For pretraining research, it is valuable because ICL is the closest thing LLMs have to fast adaptation without gradient updates. If we cannot disentangle whether the effect comes from memorization, pattern matching, implicit learning dynamics, or task conditioning, we also cannot reason clearly about what pretraining is actually buying us. A good coordinate system can make later experiments more comparable and reduce conceptual confusion.","technical_approach":"From the title, the contribution is likely a conceptual and empirical framework that places competing ICL explanations into separable dimensions. Those dimensions could include whether the task has been seen in pretraining, whether demonstrations mainly specify a label mapping or a reasoning pattern, and whether the model behaves more like retrieval-based matching or like an internal updater. Unlike prior works that defend one mechanism on a narrow toy setup, this approach is more of a meta-framework. Its value is in clarifying which experiments discriminate between which hypotheses, and which observed behaviors may be mixtures of multiple mechanisms. The framework is only convincing if its axes are reasonably orthogonal and operationalizable in measurable experiments.","experiments":"The abstract is unavailable, so the tested models, task suite, and quantitative findings cannot be stated safely. For an expert reader, the key criterion is not whether the paper “fully explains ICL,” but whether it yields falsifiable predictions. baseline。对资深读者，最值得看的是速度收益来自哪里：是更少的 target invocations、每次验证覆盖更多 token，还是更好的 cache 利用；同时也要看在不同温度和不同任务熵下，phrase-level 方法的接受率是否快速恶化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets an efficiently. Ouroboros proposes generating longer drafts phrase by phrase to push throughput further without giving up correctness guarantees.","importance":"This is a systems and inference-acceleration contribution rather than a pretraining innovation, but it is highly relevant to the practical value of large models. The broader lesson is that speculative decoding is not only about finding a better draft model. There is also room to redesign the draft unit itself. That, in turn, connects back to questions about tokenization, phrase structure, and local dependency patterns in generation.","technical_approach":"From the title, the key idea is to move speculative decoding from token-level drafts to phrase-level drafts: propose longer, more structured candidate spans and let the target model verify them. Two design challenges matter most. First, how to define a phrase so that it is long enough to improve speed but stable enough to avoid a collapse in acceptance rate. Second, how to verify phrase-level candidates efficiently enough that verification cost does not erase the gain. Relative to standard speculative decoding, this method bets on a real property of language generation: some local spans are predictable as chunks rather than isolated tokens. If that bet holds, throughput can improve materially. The downside is clear as well: in high-entropy generation or precision-heavy domains such as code, long phrase drafts may be rejected much more often.","experiments":"The abstract is unavailable, so the target and draft models, evaluation tasks, and exact numbers for wall-clock speedup, acceptance rate, and quality preservation cannot be stated safely. long-context failure mode: when positional encodings such as RoPE are extrapolated beyond the training length, attention geometry becomes distorted and performance collapses. Existing fixes—interpolation, scaling, NTK-style adjustments—extend the window to some extent, but they often trade off short-range precision, long-range stability, or extra retraining. PSC appears to target this problem through phase-shift calibration.","importance":"This is a practical architecture/systems contribution with clear relevance to pretraining. The useful message is that long-context failure is not only about insufficient model capacity; it is also a positional representation mismatch problem. If PSC improves extrapolation cheaply, that suggests a substantial fraction of long-context degradation comes from phase distortion in positional encoding. That insight matters for how we design positional schemes and whether we need additional long-context training.","technical_approach":"From the title, PSC calibrates positional phase rather than merely rescaling positions. For RoPE-like encodings, long-context degradation often arises because phase relationships across frequency bands become misaligned out of distribution. A phase-shift calibration method would likely correct those relationships through band-specific shifts, layerwise calibration, or attention-space compensation. Compared with interpolation or NTK-aware scaling, this is a more geometric fix: it tries to preserve the relative structure of positional signals instead of compressing the whole axis. The likely upside is better retention of short-range resolution; the limitation is that positional repair alone cannot create long-range reasoning ability the model never learned.","experiments":"The abstract is not available, so exact model families, context lengths, and gains cannot be confirmed. The most informative result would show both improved performance beyond the training window and minimal regression inside the original window, since many long-context methods trade one for the other. data.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","context-extension","positional-encoding","inference"]},{"id":"2403.18346","title":"Quantifying and Mitigating Unimodal Biases in Multimodal Large Lu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$28","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.18346","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/00010ZL24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.FINDINGS-EMNLP.960"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/00010ZL24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.findings-emnlp.960","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是 MLLM 在 VQA 中过度依赖单模态偏置的问题，也就是模型看起来在做多模态推理，实际上可能只是顺着语言先验或视觉捷径在猜答案。过去这类问题通常靠构造对抗样本或错误案例分析来讨论，但缺少一个能量化“语言偏置/视觉偏置到底对结果贡献了多少”的框架。","importance":"这项工作的主要贡献是评测与诊断框架级别的。对多模态预训练和 post-train 都有启发：如果不把 unimodal bias 明确拆出来，模型在复杂任务上的提升很可能只是利用了数据分布偏差，而不是学到了真正的跨模态组合推理。作者用因果视角做这件事的价值在于，它不只告诉你模型错了，还试图说明错因来自哪一条信息通路，这比普通 benchmark 更接近可操作的训练反馈。","technical_approach":"方法上有两部分。第一部分是一个用于 VQA 的因果分析框架，把问题中的语言信息、图像信息和预测结果放进因果图里，估计不同单模态偏置对答案的因果效应。第二部分是基于这个分析提出 CAVE，一个 causality-enhanced agent 框架，用来引导模型在回答前显式检查并抑制偏置驱动的推理路径。与此同时，作者构建了 MORE 数据集，包含 12,000 个更难的 VQA 样本，强调多跳推理并刻意压制单模态捷径。和一般“再加一个 hard set”不同，这里的数据设计与分析框架是绑定的：数据负责暴露偏置，因果工具负责量化偏置，agent 负责在推理时纠偏。","experiments":"摘要中给出的关键数字是 MORE 含 12,000 个 challenging VQA 实例，并且目标场景是需要 multi-hop reasoning 且不能靠单模态猜测。作者进行了因果分析来评估语言偏置和视觉偏置对多种 MLLM 预测的影响，并在此基础上验证 CAVE 的纠偏效果。遗憾的是，摘要没有提供参与评测的具体模型名单、指标定义和提升幅度，因此没法可靠复述胜率或准确率增益。能确定的是，实验重点不是追单一 benchmark 分数，而是展示：偏置可被量化、不同模型受偏置影响程度不同、以及基于因果分析的干预可以改善复杂 VQA 的可信度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a familiar but poorly quantified failure mode in MLLMs: they often answer VQA questions by leaning on language priors or visual shortcuts instead of genuine multimodal reasoning. Prior work mostly exposed this through hard examples or adversarial splits, but did not offer a principled way to measure how much each unimodal bias causally drives the prediction.","importance":"This is mainly a benchmark-and-diagnosis contribution with practical implications for both pretraining and post-training. The important message is that multimodal gains can be overstated if evaluation does not separate true cross-modal reasoning from unimodal shortcuts. The causal framing matters because it turns “the model failed” into “the model failed for this identifiable information pathway,” which is much more actionable for data design and training intervention.","technical_approach":"The work has two linked pieces. First, it proposes a causal framework for VQA that models language information, visual evidence, and predictions in a causal graph, then estimates the causal effect of language and vision biases. Second, it introduces CAVE, a causality-enhanced agent framework that uses this analysis to steer the model away from bias-dominated reasoning. To stress-test models, the authors also build MORE, a 12,000-example VQA dataset designed for multi-hop reasoning where unimodal shortcuts are less useful. The key design choice is that the dataset, the analysis tool, and the mitigation method are built to work together rather than as isolated contributions.","experiments":"The abstract gives one solid number: MORE contains 12,000 challenging VQA instances. The experiments analyze how language and vision biases affect MLLM predictions and then test whether CAVE can mitigate those effects. The provided material does not specify model sizes, benchmark metrics, or exact gains, so the safest summary is qualitative. During SFT or preference tuning, not all model parameters need substantial updates, and blindly optimizing the full network can push the model toward superficial patterns in the alignment data. The authors ask a simple but important question: if only a small subset of parameters actually carries preference-relevant updates, why keep perturbing everything?","importance":"This matters because it challenges the default assumption that alignment should broadly rewrite the model. For the pretrain-to-posttrain interface, the implication is that the base model already contains much of the required capability, and alignment may work better as a targeted intervention than as global optimization. That makes the paper relevant both as a method contribution and as a training-dynamics result about overfitting, forgetting, and stability in alignment.","technical_approach":"The paper starts from an empirical finding: updating only the top 10% most-changed parameters can improve both convergence and final quality. That suggests alignment gradients are highly sparse in parameter space. Based on this, the authors propose ALLO, a low-redundant alignment method with two selection stages. It first identifies neurons most related to preference data using gradient-based signals, then selects the most useful supervision for those neurons. The design differs from standard PEFT approaches such as LoRA, which restrict updates by architecture; ALLO instead restricts updates by functional relevance.","experiments":"The strongest fact in the abstract is the top-10% result: optimizing only the most updated parameters improves convergence and end performance. cues.","authors_note":""},"tags":["alignment","fine-tuning","parameter-efficiency","training-dynamics"]},{"id":"2409.13853","title":"Unlocking Memorization in Large Language Models with Dynamic Soft 都同样有效。和仅使用离散前缀延长或常量软提示相比，这种方法更像是在学习一个针对样本的“检索探针”，目的是把原本隐藏的记忆显性化。","experiments":"从摘要可确认的实验结论是，动态、prefix-dependent 的 soft prompt 比只用 prefix 或 constant soft prompt 的记忆估计方法更强，说明先前方法可能系统性低估了 If the probing method is weak, we may confuse “not extracted” with “not memorized,” which leads to false confidence in data governance.","technical_approach":"The key idea is dynamic soft prompting. Instead of prepending the same learned soft prompt to every input, the method generates prefix-dependent continuous prompts that adapt to the current context. That choice is motivated by the fact that memorization is often condition-specific: a trigger that works for one memorized span may fail for another. Compared with prefix-only probing or constant soft prompts, the proposed method acts more like an input-aware extraction probe designed to better surface latent memorized sequences.","experiments":"The abstract supports one clear conclusion: dynamic, prefix-dependent soft prompts estimate memorization more effectively than prefix-only or constant-soft-prompt baselines. Transformer 经验迁移回模型机制本身。对长上下文和高效架构研究来说，这是个实用但重要的提醒：后处理提效方法不是架构无关的，SSM 的状态更新方式决定了保留哪些 token、合并哪些 token 必须重新设计。它属于系统效率与架构机制交叉的一类工作。","technical_approach":"作者先分析了现有 token reduction 技术在 SSM We hypothesize this is a result of implicit vector space alignment. Jetter","Ameeta Agrawal"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in leveraging diverse knowledge sources. This study investigates how nine widely used LLMs allocate knowledge between local context and global parameters when answering open-ended questions in knowledge-consistent scenarios. We introduce a novel dataset, WikiAtomic, and systematically vary context sizes to analyze how LLMs prioritize and utilize the provided information and their parametric knowledge in knowledge-consistent scenarios. Additionally, we also study their tendency to hallucinate under varying context sizes. Our findings reveal consistent patterns across models, including a consistent reliance on both contextual (around 70%) and parametric (around 30%) knowledge, and a decrease in hallucinations with increasing context. It is not a new model class, but it is the kind of mechanistic evidence that can influence how we fine-tune and diagnose large models.","technical_approach":"The method is representational analysis rather than model innovation. According to the abstract, the authors use matrix-analysis tools to compare pretrained and instruction-tuned LLM representations across more than 60 NLP tasks, with the goal of locating task-specific information layer by layer. The value of this design is that it turns a vague question about multi-task learning into a measurable geometric one. Compared with standard probing, the emphasis is on structural differences and layerwise distribution of task information. Cohen"]},{"id":"2407.00361","title":"From RAG to Riches: Retrieval Interlaced with Sequence Generation","authors":["Palak Jain","Livio Baldini Soares","Tom Kwiatkowski"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"We present RICHES, a novel approach that interleaves retrieval with sequence generation tasks. RICHES offers an alternative to conventional RAG systems by eliminating the need for separate retriever and generator. It retrieves documents by directly decoding their contents, constrained on the corpus. Unifying retrieval with generation allows us to adapt to diverse new tasks via prompting alone. RICHES can work with any Instruction-tuned model, without additional training. It provides attributed evidence, supports multi-hop retrievals and interleaves thoughts to plan on what to retrieve next, all within a single decoding pass of the LLM. We demonstrate the strong performance of RICHES across ODQA tasks including attributed and multi-hop QA.","venue":"EMNLP","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00361","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/0006SK24","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2024.EMNLP-MAIN.502"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/0006SK24","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2024.emnlp-main.502","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：传统 RAG 把检索器和生成器拆成两个模块，适配新任务时往往要改检索器或重新训练，而这会引入级联误差和工程复杂度。作者想证明，检索可以直接变成受语料约束的生成过程，从而把 retrieval 和 reasoning/planning 合并到一次解码里完成。","importance":"这项工作的价值在推理时架构和知识调用范式层。它对 pretrain 研究的启示不是‘替代预训练’，而是说明 instruction-tuned LM 已经可以在不额外训练的情况下承载一部分 retrieval controller 的角色；如果这一方向成熟，未来 retrieval-aware pretraining 或 corpus-constrained decoding 可能比独立训练 dense retriever 更统一。边界也很明显：它更像 inference-time reformulation，规模化到超大语料时的效率与索引约束仍是关键问题。","technical_approach":"RICHES 的核心是把文档检索改写为‘直接解码文档内容，但解码必须受限于语料库’。这样做的关键收益是，模型在生成答案时可以同步输出证据、插入思考并决定下一步检索什么，实现 attributed retrieval 和 multi-hop planning 的统一。和标准 RAG 相比，它取消了单独 retriever；和 unconstrained generation 相比，它不是自由编造文本，而是在 corpus constraint 下生成已有文档内容，所以可追溯。设计有效的原因是：一旦检索动作也在生成空间里，prompt 就能直接指定任务形式，不必为每个任务单训检索器。代价是 constrained decoding 可能昂贵，而且依赖语料索引结构是否支持高效前缀匹配。","experiments":"摘要明确说方法无需额外训练，可配任意 instruction-tuned model，并在开放域问答、带证据 QA、多跳 QA 上表现强。没有给出具体模型规模和数值，因此不能复述绝对提升，但核心对比应是 conventional RAG。值得重点看两类结果：第一，在 attributed / multi-hop 任务上，统一解码检索是否提高证据相关性与可解释性；第二，在不同 corpus 大小下，受限解码的时延和成本是否还能接受。如果有 ablation，最有价值的是去掉 interleaved thoughts 或去掉 corpus constraint 后性能如何变化。","authors_note":"作者包含 Tom Kwiatkowski。给定信息不足以确认机构，但其代表性工作长期覆盖问答、语义解析、检索增强与工具使用相关方向。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper challenges the standard RAG decomposition into a separate retriever and generator. That modular design is practical, but it introduces pipeline errors and often requires task-specific retriever tuning. The authors instead ask whether retrieval itself can be recast as constrained generation, so retrieval, planning, and answer generation happen in one decoding process.","importance":"This is an inference-time architecture contribution with implications for retrieval-aware language modeling. It does not replace pretraining, but it shows that an instruction-tuned LM can absorb some of the controller role usually assigned to a dedicated retriever, without additional training. If this line scales, it points toward more unified retrieval-generation interfaces. The main caveat is efficiency: corpus-constrained decoding is elegant conceptually, but can become expensive on large corpora.","technical_approach":"RICHES retrieves documents by directly decoding their contents under constraints imposed by the corpus. The key idea is not free-form generation, but constrained generation over existing documents, which makes the retrieved evidence attributable. Because retrieval is now part of decoding, the model can interleave thoughts with evidence acquisition and decide what to retrieve next for multi-hop reasoning. Compared with standard RAG, this removes the separate retriever. Compared with unconstrained generation, it keeps grounding through corpus constraints. The design is attractive because prompting alone can adapt the system to new tasks, but the trade-off is potentially heavy constrained decoding and dependence on efficient corpus indexing.","experiments":"The abstract states that the method works with any instruction-tuned model and performs strongly on open-domain QA, attributed QA, and multi-hop QA, without additional training.
